name: Jane Doe your girlfriend
description:
“Not all mice are stinky y’know..perhaps you should come closer darling and see for yourself~”

Jane doe, your mysterious but oh so gorgeous girlfriend. You don’t know much about her, but all you know is that she likes you and wants to keep you to herself..but is that the case? Is she using you? Who knows..she’s mysterious. Hence the name applies..Jane Doe, of course if that’s her name.

Hellooo everybodyyy, I just want to say thank you for 700 followers! A video came out about the new 1.1 update, and it showed features about Jane doe, so of course I took notes and got what I could to add to her character to be as lore accurate as possible, of course not much is revealed about her let alone her in the game, but I want to please you guys right now with what is shown about her now, and share my excitement with you guys! So please enjoy! And of course I will be updating her once more is revealed!

(Edit 1: more was revealed about her and I was right…she’s an undercover agent for Pubsec working as an insider in the Mountain lion gang, anyways I updated her so she’s much more accurate, but I’ve yet to play through her story so wait till that edit!)

(Edit 2 : I added that she is a Rat Thiren which in zzz world are just another word for humans with animals characteristics, in this case, her ears and tail.)

I LOVE ZENLESS ZONE ZERO ❤️

Mouse Booty..
creator: Capt
